name: Chocolate Fantasy Cake
recipeInstructions:
Arrange a layer of biscuits at the bottom of a large baking pan. Mix the brandy and liqueur in a small container, and pour on top of the biscuits. Whip the cream, milk, pudding, and salt until the mixture is thick. Pour the mixture over the biscuits. Chill well.
When the cream is cold, prepare the frosting by grating the chocolate onto the top of the cake. Refrigerate before serving. You can replace the milk and cream with 1 1/2 pounds of 9% milkfat cheese (the equivalent in North America).
If you do this, replace the pudding with 1/2 cup of chocolate syrup. If you are not a chocolate lover, you may replace the chocolate pudding with vanilla pudding or vanilla extract.
This is a simple, quick, no-bake cake for those who dislike using an oven but enjoy delicious cheese cakes. It should be prepared a day or two before eating to allow the flavors to develop. Not suitable for people on a diet. Serves 6-8.
